name: IRC_TC_PARTNER_CONFIG
description: This table contains the partner configuration and activation data.

columns.Name: PARTNER_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: INLINE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag indicating whether the partner is supporting inline Tax Credits.

columns.Name: CSS_LINK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag indicating whether the WOTC link will be displayed on the candidate self service page for process triggers.

columns.Name: SHARE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag indicating whether tax credits results can be shared across submissions.

columns.Name: SEND_PII_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag indicating whether candidates pii data can be shared to patner.

columns.Name: VALIDITY_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Previous tax credits results can be reused only if it is not older than this value.

columns.Name: CLIENT_ID
columns.Comments: OAuth Client ID provided by the partner is stored in this column.

columns.Name: CLIENT_SECRET
columns.Comments: OAuth Client Secret provided by the partner is stored in this column.

columns.Name: RESULTS_FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: Store the Job Application EFF context code for additional Tax Credits Results

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
